description_long: This object is a set of three sleek, flexible sachets, each designed to hold lotion. The sachets are primarily silver-gray with a smooth, slightly curved profile, and feature a minimalist design. The front of each sachet displays a logo and text in black, accompanied by a small, colorful graphic element. The sachets appear to be made from a thin, metallic or plastic laminate, likely to ensure the contents remain sealed and protected. The edges are heat-sealed, and there is no visible dispenser mechanism, indicating the sachets are meant to be torn open. The overall appearance is modern and utilitarian, suitable for single-use or travel-sized personal care products.
description: A set of three silver-gray, flexible sachets with a minimalist logo and text, designed for single-use lotion packaging.
description_view_0: Front view showing the logo, text, and colorful graphic on the largest face of the sachets.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin, sealed profile and the curved, flexible shape of the sachets.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, unmarked backs of the sachets, emphasizing their smooth surface.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again highlighting the slim, heat-sealed edges and the overall curvature.
